description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this Marcus wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cmTwo main compartments on a smooth upper with stitch detailing and embossed brandingTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA flap on the left side with five card holder slots on one side and a mesh id slot on the otherThree card holder slots under the flapOne buttonable pocket on the right with brandingCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
